74302.subject: Mythos is here, but with a hidden meter and a new nickname
74302.body:
----------
######                      [Sign Up](http://utm.genai.works/r/gg2ubr5) | [Collaborate with us](https://6hhfxazcbpc.typeform.com/to/uXIl0IFH?utm_source=atlas&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=general_2026_05_11&utm_content=banner_post)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** Anthropic put its most dangerous model in everyone's hands and buried a meter in the fine print. Google moved its live interpreter into your phone's earpiece. OpenAI taught apps built on it to answer in pictures. And the 30-minute production app from Monday's Atlas gets its full breakdown.



**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Fable 5 (or Mythos) arrives:** How many days do you get before they stop your access?

* **Live translation:** Are we about to stop learning different languages?

* **OpenAI image search:** Why will apps built on OpenAI stop answering in walls of text?

* **The 30-minute app:** How does one engineer ship to production without opening a console?


----------

----------
## [Anthropic put Fable, a new nickname for Mythos, on a 13-day clock](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-fable-5-mythos-5)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/bac2ec80-67e2-4708-8f1c-19b784abd70d/Beehiiv_01_-_Jun_10.png?t=1781084107)
Caption: 

Yesterday we flagged prediction markets betting Anthropic's exploit-finding Mythos model would go public within days. Hours after we hit send, it happened. 

Fable is Latin for what mythos is in Greek. It's live for everyone, and it's the most capable model Anthropic has ever shipped to the public. Claude Fable 5 is the same as Mythos but only different in the safeguards. 

**The rest of the story sits in the fine print:**

* **The meter:** Fable is included on Pro, Max, Team and Enterprise seats through June 22. **On June 23 it comes off those plans** and runs on usage credits until capacity catches up.

* **The difference:** Ask about cybersecurity, biology or chemistry and Claude Opus 4.8 answers instead.

* **Your data:** A new policy comes with it. Anthropic will keep all Mythos-class traffic for 30 days, even business customers, to catch jailbreaks, and says the data won't train new models.

It’s already doing great things. Stripe pointed Fable at a 50-million-line codebase and got a migration **done in a day** that would have taken a full team over two months by hand. 

It needs less guidance than older models as well. Fable beat Pokémon FireRed from raw screenshots, with none of the helper tools earlier Claudes needed.

Until Monday Mythos was the model Washington wanted kept from China, capped at roughly 200 vetted security organizations. N

74301.subject: Loop Engineering: How to Design AI Loops That Build, Ship, and Improve While You Sleep 🔁
74301.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/loop-engineering-complete-guide

👋 Hey, Linas here! Every day, I break down 3 stories shaping the future of FinTech & Artificial Intelligence - plus the money movements and trends worth tracking. First time here? 390k+ FinTech and AI leaders get this daily. Join them:
On June 7, 2026, Peter Steinberger - the creator of OpenClaw [ https://substack.com/redirect/5698d187-0f71-4ae0-8d67-fc7702b8c7fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], the open-source AI agent project that became the most-starred new repo in GitHub history [ https://substack.com/redirect/5698d187-0f71-4ae0-8d67-fc7702b8c7fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] - posted twelve words that broke the entire AI-coding internet:
“You shouldn’t be prompting coding agents anymore. You should be designing loops that prompt your agents.”
Boris Cherny, the Creator & Head of Claude Code at Anthropic [ https://substack.com/redirect/2c719e3a-3ef1-4b49-bc5b-beb5d6138413?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], said the same thing on stage a few days before:
“I don’t prompt Claude anymore. I have loops running. They’re the ones prompting Claude and figuring out what to do. My job is to write loops.”
Source: Boris Cherny: Claude Code & the Future of Engineering | Acquired Unplugged presented by WorkOS. [ https://substack.com/redirect/4e1d1e4f-9cd0-4a4e-86aa-66db75eb5b49?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]
Two statements. Millions of views. And a wave of confusion, because almost nobody could define what a loop actually was.
This guide was written to answer this completely. And it’s not just for engineers, but also for the founders trying to ship faster with a team of two, the investors trying to evaluate which AI-native companies are building durable advantages, and the operators trying to understand why their competitors seem to be moving at a different speed.
What you’ll find inside:
Where loops came from and how they actually work
The full anatomy of a loop and how to build one in under ten minutes
The 14-step roadmap from manual prompter to loop engineer
A practical catalog of 41 pre-built loops ready to copy-paste today
Designing loops with Claude Fable 5, Anthropic’s newest frontier AI model built from the ground up for long-horizon agentic autonomy
Where loops fail, what they cost, and the three debts that get worse the better they work.
The leverage point has now clearly moved. Prompting was last year. This is what’s next, and it is available for everyone right now.
What Is a Loop?...

Unsubscribe https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5hcy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWN0aW9uL2Rpc2FibGVfZW1haWw_dG9rZW49ZXlKMWMyVnlYMmxrSWpveE1Ea3dOVFV6TURnc0luQnZjM1JmYVdRaU9qSXdNVFF4TlRZeE1Td2lhV0YwSWpveE56Z3hNRGd6T1RJNExDSmxlSEFpT2pFNE1USTJNVGs1TWpnc0ltbHpjeUk2SW5CMVlpMDRNVGd4T1NJc0luTjFZaUk2SW1ScGMyRmliR1Z

74294.subject: Zlato nemusí byť len téma pre bohatých. Prečo sa o ňom opäť hovorí ako o poistke do neistých čias
74294.body:
Správy, na ktorých záleží

Автор: Startitup


Автор: Startitup

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/zlato-nemus%C3%AD-by%C5%A5-len-t%C3%A9ma-pre-bohat%C3%BDch-pre%C4%8Do-sa-o-%C5%88om-op%C3%A4%C5%A5-hovor%C3%AD-10pff?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B3zBBwWwYS0yOP3lqgZSVDA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=24hFAHXViyYYg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq7s4smq~lw-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq7s4smq-lw
  
Investovanie dnes ponúka viacero možností. Od ETF fondov cez akcie až po digitálne aktíva. Fyzické zlato však v portfóliu plní inú úlohu. Nestojí len na vývoji ceny, ale aj na reálnom vlastníctve, dlhodobom uchovaní hodnoty a nezávislosti od finančného systému. Nie je to nástroj na krátkodobú špekuláciu. Nie je to pokus trafiť najnižšiu cenu a o pár týždňov predať so ziskom. Pri fyzickom zlate dáva zmysel skôr dlhodobý pohľad, ochrana hodnoty a doplnok k širšiemu portfóliu. „My nešpekulujeme. Fyzické zlato sa nehodí na špekulácie. Buď si pravidelne nakupoval a tešíš sa, pretože si zarobil, alebo si pravidelne nenakupoval a začni,“ povedal v relácii Cashflow Martin Zolák, predseda predstavenstva Epo Invest. EPO Invest je slovenská spoločnosť, ktorá pôsobí v oblasti investičného zlata od roku 2012. Stavia na transparentnosti, bezpečí a priamom vlastníctve fyzického kovu. Klient vlastní svoj podiel na investičnom zlate od Rakúskej mincovne Münze Österreich AG. Zlato sa skladuje na Slovensku a pravidelne ho kontrolujú nezávislí audítori. Spoločnosť umožňuje pravidelné sporenie už od 20 eur mesačne aj jednorazový nákup väčších objemov zlata. Platby smerujú priamo do fyzického kovu bez skrytých poplatkov za uskladnenie počas stanovenej doby. Fyzické zlato nie je len číslo na obrazovke Najväčší rozdiel medzi fyzickým a „papierovým“ zlatom je jednoduchý. Fyzické zlato človek reálne vlastní. Drží ho v ruke, môže ho uskladniť, vybrať, preniesť a v prípade potreby predať. Zolák upozorňuje, že práve táto vlastnosť z neho robí špecifické aktívum. Nejde iba o pohyb ceny. Ide aj o to, že fyzické zlato nemá riziko protistrany. Inými slovami, jeho hodnota nestojí na sľube brokera, emitenta, aplikácie či finančnej inštitúcie. Aj preto sa zlato často označuje ako bezpečný prístav. Nie preto, že by jeho cena nikdy neklesala – aj zlato kolíše. Jeho hlavný význam však spočíva v tom, že dlhodobo odoláva znehodnocovaniu peňazí, inflácii a neistote. Dôležitá nie je otázka „kedy kúpiť“, ale „ako dlho držať“ Jedným z kľúčových záverov rozhovoru je, že fyzické zlato nedáva zmysel riešiť cez optiku krátkodobej ceny. Ak človek čaká na ideálny moment, môže čakať donekonečna. Zmysluplnejší prístup je pravidelný nákup. Menšie sumy, dlhší horizont a disciplína. Práve tak sa dá zlato zaradiť do finančného plánovania
